title: Phase 9: CRM backend - CRM service, estimate service, API routes
description: Build CRM backend: CRM service with leads management, follow-ups, dormant customer detection, and cross-sell rules; estimate service with CRUD, line items, margin calculation, and expiration tracking; and all CRM API routes.
steps: Create src/lib/services/crm.service.ts with lead lifecycle management (NEW -> CONTACTED -> ESTIMATE_SENT -> FOLLOW_UP -> NEGOTIATION -> WON -> LOST)
Implement dormant customer detection (configurable inactivity threshold)
Implement cross-sell rule engine ('buys X but not Y' pattern matching)
Create src/lib/services/estimate.service.ts with estimate CRUD, line item management
Implement margin calculation and expiration tracking
